{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322065150B2D8BD1D5F33CE9EACDC"}"},"total":908},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7179241514588209975","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这已经是海贼中比较好的书了[送心][送心][送心]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1671547541,"group_id":"7144999142182358048","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"富贵我就淫，贫贱我就移，威武我就屈，色诱我就从，不打我就招，打我我就哭，有苦我不吃，有福我就享，是金子总会被我花光，人生在世三万天，我能活一天是一天","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N7bwx9y6lWKk5utNyN5GKaeYr5zSlqwED9fLfX5/pmGl","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/d52b69f99a114e1d83d8a191f58584fd~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776702689&x-signature=nRZpKaO6ziK2QCTtXKFeOfxe%2F0A%3D","user_id":"2796812950337630","user_name":"亃"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2796812950337630","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7144999142182358048","book_info":{"abstract":"（跟船流+穿越+搞笑+风骚+热血......）
二十一世纪孤儿林海，一次意外穿越到海贼王世界。
自此，草帽海贼团的画风开始渐渐变了，变得更加离谱......
路飞：“喂林海，你在干什么？”
林海风骚的抹了一下自己的秀发：“听好了路飞，发型是一个男人的灵魂，头可断，血可流，发型不能乱！”
路飞双眼放光道：“这就是男人的浪漫吗？”
然后林海与路飞搭着彼此的肩膀欢呼起来，“浪漫，浪漫......”
娜美暴怒:“你们两个混蛋再跳，船就要翻了，给我适可而止吧......”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/112bb5b48014f6a155cd2e790e633faa","author":"那年岁末","author_id":"","book_id":"7144999142182358048","book_name":"穿越海贼，开局就把卡普气炸","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#482010","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.2万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":718,"name":"动漫衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=718&name=动漫衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":39,"name":"二次元","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=39&name=二次元&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":370,"name":"海贼","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=370&name=海贼&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":538,"name":"同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538&name=同人&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079&name=衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7145007452411560463","read_count":"11361","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1534892"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.2","serial_count":"676","tags":"动漫衍生,系统,穿越,二次元,海贼,同人,衍生","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/d738a8b557d7ee19357d4dd7900a60b7~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779317510&x-signature=05ZfaaKt%2B46pnld5YQ1m3WZAM1M%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"720926167284984","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"1.1233668e+07"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322065150B2D8BD1D5F33CE9EACDC"}"},"r
